ddls:
CREATE TABLE "graphs" (
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph */,
  "graph_order" INTEGER /* Order of the graph (number of nodes) */,
  "graph_type" TEXT /* Type of the graph (e.g., Small-World (SF)) */,
  "graph_mean_degree" REAL /* Mean degree of the graph */,
  "graph_index" INTEGER /* Index of the graph */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the graph was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the graph was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the graph */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gossip_protocols" (
  "gossip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gossip protocol */,
  "gossip_name" TEXT /* Name of the gossip protocol (e.g., Push-Sum (PUSHSUM)) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gossip protocol */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protocol was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protocol was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gossip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph used in the simulation */,
  "gossip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gossip protocol used in the simulation */,
  "simulation_counter" INTEGER /* Counter for the simulation (number of times the simulation has been run) */,
  "stopping_threshold" INTEGER /* Stopping threshold for the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_gossip_id FOREIGN KEY ("gossip_id") REFERENCES gossip_protocols ("gossip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the metric belongs to */,
  "mean_l1_absolute_error" REAL /* Mean L1 absolute error */,
  "var_l1_absolute_error" REAL /* Variance of L1 absolute error */,
  "mean_l2_error" REAL /* Mean L2 error */,
  "var_l2_error" REAL /* Variance of L2 error */,
  "mean_rounds" REAL /* Mean rounds */,
  "var_rounds" REAL /* Variance of rounds */,
  "mean_effective_rounds" REAL /* Mean effective rounds */,
  "var_effective_rounds" REAL /* Variance of effective rounds */,
  "mean_wasted_rounds" REAL /* Mean wasted rounds */,
  "var_wasted_rounds" REAL /* Variance of wasted rounds */,
  "mean_messages" REAL /* Mean messages */,
  "var_messages" REAL /* Variance of messages */,
  "mean_busy_messages" REAL /* Mean busy messages */,
  "var_busy_messages" REAL /* Variance of busy messages */,
  "mean_shared_neighbors" REAL /* Mean shared neighbors */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation setting */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the simulation setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_settings_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph property */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the graph property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the graph property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_properties_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gossip_protocol_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gossip protocol setting */,
  "gossip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gossip protocol the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the gossip protocol setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the gossip protocol setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gossip_protocol_settings_gossip_id FOREIGN KEY ("gossip_id") REFERENCES gossip_protocols ("gossip_id")
)
